post.summary: Start Debug Session from Error Span.
Create new file in s3 for rrweb.

get.summary: Get session notes context for a debug session.
get.description: Returns structured notes and sketch attachments extracted from the session recording's Yjs document.

timestamp.description: Timestamp in milliseconds relative to session start.

get.summary: List Affected end-users by title hash.

patch.summary: Update End User Session Recording Settings.
Bulk Update End User Session Recording Settings.

post.summary: Create a new chat with an agent.

agentType.description: Type of agent to assign to the chat.

agentId.description: Optional ID of a specific agent to assign. If omitted, the first available agent is used.

context.description: Optional context. Omit entirely to start a free-form chat with no issue attached.

issue.description: Optional issue to resolve. If omitted, the chat starts without an issue.

componentHash.description: Component hash of the issue to resolve.

debugSession.description: Optional debug session to attach as context.

400.description: No available agent of the requested type.

post.summary: Send a message and stream the agent response as SSE.

200.description: SSE stream of message:new and chat:update events.

post.summary: Generate a title for a chat.

dir.description: Working directory associated with the chat.

chatIds.description: Array of chat ids to delete.

get.summary: Subscribe to SSE stream for an existing chat.

200.description: SSE stream of message:new and chat:update events.

post.summary: Request the agent to abort the current processing.
Post an action to an agent chat (e.g. approve/reject a tool call).

patch.summary: Update a tool call in a chat message.

schema.description: At least one of input, output, or status must be provided.

post.summary: Attach a debug session recording to a chat.
post.description: Adds the debug session to the chat's attached recordings and immediately injects its session notes as context.

404.description: Chat or debug session not found.

delete.summary: Detach a debug session recording from a chat.
delete.description: Removes the debug session from the chat's attached recordings. Idempotent — safe to call even if the session was already detached.

200.description: Updated agent chat with the debug session detached.

post.summary: Get a presigned S3 upload URL for a file.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the file (e.g. image/png).

chatId.description: Agent chat id to associate the file with.

userId.description: User id to scope the file under.

url.description: Presigned S3 PUT URL valid for 15 minutes.

key.description: S3 object key where the file will be stored.

400.description: File too large or MIME type not allowed.

samplingRate.description: A value between 0 and 1 representing the percentage of sessions to record that match the conditions.
A value between 0 and 1 representing the percentage of sessions to record that match the conditions.
A value between 0 and 1 representing the percentage of sessions to record that match the conditions.

filter.description: Filter to select which chats to update.

ids.description: Array of chat ids to update.

payload.description: Fields to update on the matched chats.

dir.description: Working directory associated with the chat.

fixabilityScore.description: AI-generated score (0–100) indicating how feasible it is to auto-fix this issue. Set by the debugging agent after analysing traces and logs.

maxRemoteSessionRecordings.description: Maximum number of recording sessions per day.
Maximum number of recording sessions per day.

ServiceName.description: Service name that emitted the span

consecutiveTimeouts.description: Number of consecutive AI-response timeouts for this agent.

errored.description: When true the agent has exceeded the consecutive-timeout limit and will not be assigned new chats.

contextKey.description: Unique key tying the chat to a resource (e.g. componentHash).

startedByWorkspaceUser.description: Workspace user id who started the chat.

attachedDebugSessions.description: Debug session recordings manually attached to this chat.

dir.description: Working directory associated with the chat.
